content.full_text:
February 1, 1990

The Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 J Street, Suite 800  
Sacramento, CA 95814

Gentlemen:

This letter is written to seek your assistance in clarifying the reporting requirements of the FPPC relative to the Doctors’ Company and its wholly owned subsidiary The Doctors’ Management Company.

I am registered as the lobbying firm for The Doctors’ Company, which is an unincorporated interinsurance exchange. The company has reported my representation and expenses through its attorney-in-fact, The Doctors’ Management Company, which is the incorporated operating entity for the exchange. The Doctors’ Company also employs the services of William Barnaby as a registered lobbyist and makes campaign contributions through The Doctors’ Management Company and files all legally required reports through that wholly owned and controlled entity.

Recently, the Secretary of State’s office and your office have questioned the fact that while I am registered on behalf of The Doctors’ Company, my expenses are reported through the management entity. We seek to have your office and the Secretary of State’s office recognize that these entities are in fact one in the same and that the reporting by the operating management entity is on behalf of The Doctors’ Company exchange as well as for itself.

We would appreciate having you review this matter and make the necessary corrections to your files to reflect that The Doctors’ Company and The Doctors’ Management Company are legally and practically the same entity and that the report filed quarterly by the management entity reflects the consolidated filing for both entities. We also would appreciate your assistance in informing the Secretary of State’s office of this change, if you are agreeable to make it, so that we can proceed to have them waive the penalty assessed against the company in error.

Please feel free to contact Sheldon Davidow, Vice President, Governmental and Corporate Relations for The Doctors’ Company at (916) 448-0875 with any further questions that you may have regarding this matter.

Yours very truly,

[signature]
Gordon Cologne

cc: Secretary of State,
    Attention: Brenda Richards
